RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0001 Page 2 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO × LTV (cont.) FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 700-739 4.32% 7.93% 4.82% 9.43% 4.69% 740-779 13.08% 4.44% 11.32% 10.78% 5.32% 780+ 4.22% 12.18% 6.64% 10.15% 5.21%
